programme.title: (Y)our House - ACT RIGHT x Les Cahiers Fxminins
programme.desc: (Y)our House invites ACT RIGHT and Les Cahiers Fxminins in this new episode with LEXI, ZAZU and Desire!

programme.title: Crusoe: Heroes & Villains
programme.desc: Based on the timeless and much-loved novel by Daniel Defoe, this action-packed adventure follows the thrilling escapades of Crusoe, who embarks on a high-seas adventure and gets shipwrecked on a remote tropical island.

programme.title: Crusoe: The Name of the Game
programme.desc: Based on the timeless and much-loved novel by Daniel Defoe, this action-packed adventure follows the thrilling escapades of Crusoe, who embarks on a high-seas adventure and gets shipwrecked on a remote tropical island.

programme.title: Crusoe: Smoke and Mirrors
programme.desc: Based on the timeless and much-loved novel by Daniel Defoe, this action-packed adventure follows the thrilling escapades of Crusoe, who embarks on a high-seas adventure and gets shipwrecked on a remote tropical island.

programme.title: Flight World War II
programme.desc: Caught in a battle between Allied and German Forces, a modern day 757 mysteriously travels back in time to 1940. In their desperation to return home safely, the plane's passengers manage to turn the tide that wins the war in Europe.

programme.title: Captain Sabertooth
programme.desc: The orphan boy Pinky follows the Captain on an exciting and dangerous journey across the big oceans to the kingdom of Lama Rama, hunting for a treasure and the answer to who is Pinky's father.

programme.title: Age of the Dragons
programme.desc: Herman Melville's classic novel Moby Dick, is recreated in a world where Captain Ahab and his crew search for a Great White Dragon.

programme.title: Jack Hunter: And The Star of Heaven
programme.desc: Jack Hunter realizes the pharaoh's tomb being empty except for a Roman coin means the treasure was looted to Rome but later probably transferred the the new, Byzantine capital, Constantinople.

programme.title: 6 Below
programme.desc: An adrenaline-seeking snowboarder gets lost in a massive winter storm in the back country of the High Sierras where he is pushed to the limits of human endurance and forced to battle his own personal demons as he fights for survival....

programme.title: Adventurer
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Mariah Mundi's life is turned upside down when his parents vanish and his younger brother is kidnapped. Following a trail of clues to the darkly majestic Prince Regent Hotel, Mariah discovers a hidden realm of child-stealing monsters, deadly secrets and a long-lost artifact that grants limitless wealth - but also devastating supernatural power. With the fate of his world, and his family at stake, Mariah will risk everything to unravel the Curse of the Midas Box!

programme.title: Spooky Stakeout
programme.desc: Prepare to be totally spooked with a one-of-a-kind ghost busting adventure. When four friends are hired as ghost hunters to investigate a peculiar case of a haunted castle, they are in for an unexpected surprise. From their previous work they realise that there is a strange similarity across all three mysteries. Full of age-appropriate scares and fun-filled humour, perfect for a scary night in!

programme.title: Jock of the Bushveld
programme.desc: Short legs, big heart that's Jock who grows up in South Africa with his loyal friend Percy

programme.title: The Forger
programme.desc: Joshua (Josh Hutcherson) has a talent - he is able to recreate any painting given to him. So when local art forger Everly (Alfred Molina) promises Joshua he can make him millions, he agrees to forge a specific painting which is apparently lost but in doing so gets tangled in a web of lies and betrayal.

programme.title: World Nature Heritage - USA-Yellowstone
programme.desc: A journey to the home of magnificent bison herds and the oldest national park in the world

programme.title: FUNKE Stories - Janvier Wete von Minute Shorts übers Filmemachen, Mut und Medien
programme.desc: Ein Gespräch übers Filmemachen, Mut, Medien, Kino und Erfolg mit Janvier Wete, Gründer der Kurzfilm-Plattform Minute Shorts und Sou Boujloud von FredCarpet

programme.title: Words That I Can't Express
programme.desc: Sometimes words aren’t enough and don’t need to be said. This playlist exemplifies that!

programme.title: Around the World in a Minute
programme.desc: Around the world in a Minute is a series of short films that takes you through different perspectives in foreign parts of the world!

programme.title: Minute Moments
programme.desc: The Minute Moments show is all about the precious moments that we share together that make us human. We leave a footprint in the lives of everyone we come across!

programme.title: Minute Sports
programme.desc: A celebration of short films based around the topics of Sports, whether that be conventional or unconventional. Competitive or leisurely, all of these films have a subject at the center!

programme.title: First comes Love
programme.desc: All you need is love this Valentine's day, dive into a beautiful sequence of shorts to celebrate the day of love, through the eyes of these beautiful stories, as told through Minute Shorts.

programme.title: Screening for Ukraine
programme.desc: This playlist was born out of fundraiser event in aid of the ongoing war in Ukraine: Screening for Ukraine. All the films featured were selected on the day as well as additional films for your viewing..

programme.title: Civil Love
programme.desc: Rachel is a widow during the Civil War who holds the South responsible for her husband's death. When a wounded enemy soldier takes refuge in her barn, Rachel reluctantly helps him. As she gets to know him more, she realizes she must protect him from the dangerous men pursuing him, and discovers a courage she didn't know she had - the courage to love again.

programme.title: Winslow, The Christmas Bear
programme.desc: Once upon a time one Christmas Eve, a little girl named Chrissy found a Magic Storybook. When she opened the book she read about Winslow who was a bear that wasn’t at all like the other bears. He decided that instead of hibernating for the winter, he would go out and ask each of his animal friends what Christmas really was and that's exactly what he did.

programme.title: Farm To Fork To Love
programme.desc: A young and talented chef, ALICE (Meggan Kaiser), works as a sous chef at one of the top restaurants in New York. After a disastrous night serving a food critic, she receives an invitation to judge a food competition in honor of the prestigious annual fundraiser for the St. Andrew’s Children’s Hospital. Alice accepts the invitation despite the dismay of BRETT, her boss who is also her boyfriend. Once she gets to Kansas, Alice is surprised to find her former boyfriend in college, CHRISTIAN (Scot cooper), is amongst the judges. The cooking show and her reconnection with Christian will make Alice reconsider her calling and make her dreams come true.

programme.title: Saving Westbrook High
programme.desc: Manny Cortez is uprooting his family so that they can go to Westbrook High where his beloved late father was the football coach. Soon after the Cortez family moves into the Westbrook school zone, however, it is announced that the beloved school will close due to budget cuts. Long known for being a wonderful environment with special teachers, the staff, students and parents decide to put aside their personal differences and fight back for the memories - past, present and future - worth saving.

programme.title: Missed Connections
programme.desc: Marc Reid, a romance novelist, is set up on a blind date by his over-excited sister. Marc, a little less than enthusiastic, ends up picking up the wrong girl from the apartment complex.

programme.title: Meerkat Moonship
programme.desc: Timid, wildly imaginative 13-year-old Gideonette de La Rey learns that the name she was given comes with a horrible curse. After her father dies, Gideonette is paralyzed by fear and is sent to live on a farm in the forest with her grandparents where she befriends a young deaf boy who is “training” to become an astronaut and preparing to fly away in a Moonship that Gideonette’s grandfather had built.

programme.title: LISTEN
programme.desc: A young deaf boy persists in embracing his passion for music. Along with his encouraging mother, he faces the day that might change their lives.

programme.title: JOE
programme.desc: A newly hired barista meets the man of her dreams and lies about her job, but she soon discovers his favorite coffee shop is also where she works.

programme.title: The Ballerina, Her Shoemaker and His Apprentice
programme.desc: Set in the 1930s a young shoemaker's apprentice becomes infatuated with a ballerina.

programme.title: Never Without My Denture
programme.desc: Four pensioners in a nursing home are watching their favorite soap opera when the evil nurse confiscates the TV remote.

programme.title: The award
programme.desc: A 10 yrs old Albanian Muslim kid tries to win the award money in a Christian religious competition to help his sick brother.

programme.title: Joy Et Cetera
programme.desc: A group of lexicographers must vote to eradicate all unnecessary, objectionable words when in walks the new typist with fresh questions.

programme.title: Where Are You Buddy?
programme.desc: Documentary about child laborers working in different industries in Turkey.

programme.title: BUI
programme.desc: When Anna moves to a new town the local children are hostile, but everything changes when a strange boy helps her to show them what she is made of.

programme.title: Siemiany
programme.desc: Two teenage boys meet every summer in a small village, but this year their friendship takes on new meaning.

programme.title: Tea for Two
programme.desc: Jim and Alice are working in a village tea shop. When some customers finally arrive, they soon discover what's really being served up by their hosts.

programme.title: Forgotten Life
programme.desc: Documentary about the bright moments among the dark for those suffering with dementia.

programme.title: Heart of Gold
programme.desc: A mother sees a chance to escape the hardships of poverty by selling her organs, but soon her craving for more gold takes over with sad consequences.

programme.title: Come Around
programme.desc: Bela, a first-generation Filipina immigrant, must face her parents' prejudice regarding her sexual orientation.

programme.title: Everybody Knows
programme.desc: A small-town musician returns home after failing to make it in LA and must face those who know him best.

programme.title: Drown the Clown
programme.desc: A dunk tank clown manipulates a father with buried ambitions.

programme.title: The ballad of pipe and necklace
programme.desc: In the Stone Age a Slovenian boy and a Croatian girl embark on adventure to stay together despite their tribes differences.

programme.title: Whales don't swim
programme.desc: Yves finds refuge from school bullies in synchronized swimming, which he practices nightly in secret until someone discovers what he is up to.

programme.title: Comme des Grands
programme.desc: Lukas surprises Marion by proposing to her. They own a brand new house, all the ingredients for adulthood and commitment are there, or so they thought.

programme.title: Golden Voices
programme.desc: A paranormal investigator wants to uncover the source of the Golden Voices appearing on unknown frequencies across Indiana.

programme.title: Have Wine, Will Travel
programme.desc: Betty is fighting a hangover. In between morning sips of wine, she finds herself entangled with three strangers claiming to be time travelers.

programme.title: GONE
programme.desc: When an architect makes a hugely consequential error on a building site, his attempted cover up becomes the least of his problems.

programme.title: Chasing Lines
programme.desc: A subconscious search of cosmic creativity, a dialogue with Earth.

programme.title: Noddy
programme.desc: Mark has spent the last decade behind politicians nodding and blending in, that is until he is nominated for 'Noddy of the Year'

programme.title: The Last Schnitzel
programme.desc: The president of The Grand Turkish Republic demands a schnitzel from his assistant as a condition to leave the Earth safely before it vanishes.

programme.title: THE NEXT MORNING
programme.desc: When Damien attends a family wedding, he has no place to sleep and guests who ignore him. To find his place in life, Damien can only count on himself.

programme.title: EAT ME!
programme.desc: An airhead beauty is transformed by her vision of singing and dancing food, and forced to revaluate her attitude towards it.

programme.title: Coelacanth
programme.desc: Bob finds himself stuck in the countryside after burying his wife, where he is forced to be taken in by Dave, who wants nothing to do with him.

programme.title: Hymn of Hate
programme.desc: Set in No Man's Land at The Somme during WW1, this is a poignant and still relevant story for our times.

programme.title: MY BOYFRIEND'S DAUGHTER
programme.desc: When a young woman's much older boyfriend refuses to introduce her to his daughter, she decides to take matters into her own hands.

programme.title: TheDadLab - Season 1 - TheDadLab: Learning while crafting
programme.desc: Five Senses Activities Ideas for Kids. 5 Amazing Paper Plate Art and Craft Ideas for Kids | Paper Plate Craft, Puzzles and Games for Kids. Learn Alphabet | 5 Smart Ways to Learn Letters

programme.title: Maya the Bee - Season 2 - The Exile
programme.desc: Beeswax was accused - wrongly - of stealing royal jelly in the pantry. He is arrested and banished from the hive by the bee queen. Maya and her friends promise to help him find the real offender..

programme.title: Maya the Bee - Season 2 - Draw Me a Beeswax
programme.desc: Beeswax is furious: someone has drawn a caricature of him in a hallway of the hive. He wants to punish all bees until he finds the one who did it. Maya wants to find out who the artist was, to solve the problem…

programme.title: Heidi - Season 1 - Trapped in the Manor
programme.desc: Winter has arrived and now Heidi is stuck in the cabin. She asks Grandfather to go to the village to see Peter after school. Grandfather agrees and she goes down to the village on Grandfather’s sled. She peers inside the classroom and observes Peter. After school, Peter and Heidi are attacked with snowballs by Karl and Theresa, who blame Peter for having being punished by the teacher.

programme.title: Mia and me - Season 2 - Behind the Curtain
programme.desc: Mia starts to become acquainted with life on the farm, even riding Johnny, Renzo’s old horse. But quite unexpectedly she meets her nemesis from Boarding School – Violetta, who is also spending her holidays on her mother’s nearby estate. In Centopia, Mia, Yuko and Mo try to find proof that Rixel is playing a tricky game and is not what he pretends to be. But when Onchao is captured by Gargona and the Elves manage to free him, they learn why Rixel really arrived in Centopia!

programme.title: Maya the Bee - Season 2 - Bad Company
programme.desc: Beatrice is bored with the young insects in the meadow who play kid's games. She dreams of playing with teenager friends. The wasp Doz invites her to join his team: she'll have much more fun with them than with the small ones. Beatrice accepts…

programme.title: Heidi - Season 1 - The Challenge
programme.desc: Little Bear has healed and Heidi goes back to the meadow with Peter. They gradually adapt to each other, and Peter shows off a bit when Karl and his gang (Theresa and William) show up to bully them. They catch Heidi and promise to release her only if Peter gives them his goatherd money. To save Heidi, Peter challenges Karl: the first on top of Jackdaw’s Cliff wins!

programme.title: Mia and me - Season 2 - Dancing with Stars
programme.desc: Violetta finds out about Saphir’s salvation while Mario and Renzo understand that Mia may be the only person, able to ride that horse. In Centopia, the search for the pieces of Unicorn King Ono’s crown continues. Mia’s oracle is giving the lead – pointing to the Star Unicorn. Our friends seek the help of Simo and Tessandra and are about to experience the most wonderful night they can imagine.

programme.title: Maya the Bee - Season 2 - Dung Ball Drama
programme.desc: At a gathering with other insects, Max complains about the dung balls that pose a threat to the meadow. Maya tries to make everyone understand that the dung beetles fulfill an important task for the meadow, namely they clear away all rubbish. Upset, the dung beetles go on strike…

programme.title: Maya the Bee - Season 2 - Big Ball
programme.desc: Kurt discovers that there has never been a famous dung beetle. He is determined to change that by making the biggest ball of dung ever rolled by a dung beetle. The ball he rolls is indeed gigantic, but unfortunately so is its smell. The big ball fills the whole meadow with its stench. But Kurt is proud of his work and doesn't want to destroy it under any circumstances. Maya has to come up with something to make Kurt change his mind and make the air in the meadow fresh and clean again.

programme.title: Maya the Bee - Season 2 - On Top Form
programme.desc: Shelby finds a bottle of royal jelly on the main road. He heard that this liquid has a magic power… He drinks it and suddenly, he can run like the wind. Soon all the bugs of the meadow are in super shape thanks to the royal jelly. Maya gets worried and decides to make them quit stop drinking it… but even if the power of the jelly is in their head, the bugs are now addicted to this substance…

programme.title: Maya the Bee - Season 2 - Theo
programme.desc: A young bee-boy comes to the hive: Théo. He has a bad temper and refuses to fly. Maya discovers that Théo has a secret - a damaged wing. For Maya, the idea that he has to do without friends because of his disability is terrifying and she decides to help Théo.

programme.title: Mia and me - Season 2 - The Animal Guardians
programme.desc: After picking apples from a tree on the di Nola estate with Renzo and Mario, Mia makes first contact with Contessa di Nola, Violetta’s arrogant mother. While Renzo makes delicious apple pies, Mia escapes to Centopia where Onchao is still fighting for acceptance among a group of foals. And she is right on time to help the Elves defend the Crater against Rixel and his dragon Gurga. By chance, Mia discovers an effective weapon that fights off Gurga. And Onchao’s brave air battles earn him the recognition of Esko and the Unicorn foals.

programme.title: Louie - Season 2 - Episodes 25-27
programme.desc: Louie, Draw Me a Dinosaur Louie, Draw Me a Flamingo Louie, Draw Me a Pirate Ship Have you ever dreamed of exploring an island or travelling to the moon? Do you yearn to race cars or talk to friendly bears? No problem! Everything is possible with Louie! With his and Yoko´s help, you´ll learn how to draw while having fun!

programme.title: Heidi - Season 1 - Save Chippy
programme.desc: A few days later, Heidi saves a goldfinch from a jackdaw’s attack but the goldfinch is wounded. Against Grandfather’s advice, Heidi decides to save the wounded bird and she needs Peter’s help for that. At his place, Peter is gone for the day in the woods and Heidi meets Peter’s Grandmother, an old and blind woman. She tells Heidi she can save the bird with Artemisia, a mountain herb.

programme.title: Maya the Bee - Season 2 - Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: A shadow hangs over the meadow and the beehive: it comes from an unidentified object perched on a tree in the meadow. Everyone is afraid and remains stashed … Maya, courageous, wants to be sure this is a real danger.

programme.title: Car City Universe - Car City: Amber the Ambulance - Hot and Dizzy
programme.desc: Carl got dizzy coming down his curly slide and bumped himself. Amber comes and diagnoses the problem with a thermometer (he’s overheated after helping Frank put out a fire). Amber treats him with syrup and cools him with a fan. To finish, she puts a plaster over his small injury.

programme.title: Maya the Bee - Season 2 - The Plot
programme.desc: Maya and Willy discover a diary. It belongs to Beeswax and reading it, the two little bees understand that the prime minister is planning something big for the Queen and the hive. Maya is sure: it’s a coup plot. Maya and Willy want to warn the Queen. But are they right? Is it really a coup?

programme.title: Heidi - Season 1 - A Night out
programme.desc: After Peter tells her how much he hates school and how unbearable it is, Heidi is scared that Grandfather will force her to go to school next winter. At the same time, Grandfather receives a letter from Dete saying that she’ll come back next spring to take Heidi away. Grandfather is upset and clams up when Heidi asks him if she’ll have to go to school.

programme.title: Maya the Bee - Season 2 - Triple Trouble
programme.desc: The triplets Zip, Zap and Zoe do not stop shouting "wolf" when there is no danger. Maya has had enough of it… An adventure with Maya will teach the triplets it is not fun to scare others without a reason.

programme.title: Bugged - Season 1 - Episodes 43-45
programme.desc: Absolute zero Pester wontrol Handicapped Follow our hero Murphy in his doomed quest to capture the ultimate prize: a bug called Puck. But, for Murphy, nothing ever works the way it should and he has big competition: Blat Jack, a super bounty hunter. Everything that can go wrong will go wrong! Relive the glory days of burlesque cartoons!

programme.title: Mia and me - Season 2 - The Spell of the Green Fluids
programme.desc: Franca visits her grandson Mario at Renzo’s farm, preparing dinner for all of them, when suddenly the bank manager shows up again, accompanied by a surveyor. Pretending to call Paula, Mia disappears to Centopia. There Rixel and Gargona pay a visit to Polytheus who tells them about a secret tunnel leading into the Elven Crater and handing them two devices that might help them finding this tunnel.

programme.title: Louie - Season 2 - Épisodes 4-6
programme.desc: Louie, Draw Me a Scarecrow Louie, Draw Me a Parrot Louie, Draw Me a Giraffe Have you ever dreamed of exploring an island or travelling to the moon? Do you yearn to race cars or talk to friendly bears? No problem! Everything is possible with Louie! With his and Yoko´s help, you´ll learn how to draw while having fun!

programme.title: Maya the Bee - Season 2 - The Fortune Teller
programme.desc: Lara says she can foresee the future. Maya does not believe her… and is angry with her meadow's friends who believe in the ladybug's super power. How will Maya change theit minds?

programme.title: Maya the Bee - Season 2 - Ants See Red
programme.desc: Paul and his ants broke Kurt’s dungball. Furious, Kurt decides to replace Paul and his men by red ants, deemed very effective in helping the insects of the meadow. But perhaps the red ants are overzealous…

programme.title: Bugged - Season 1 - Episodes 37-39
programme.desc: Jurassic Puck Between the earth and the sky Dumb luck Follow our hero Murphy in his doomed quest to capture the ultimate prize: a bug called Puck. But, for Murphy, nothing ever works the way it should and he has big competition: Blat Jack, a super bounty hunter. Everything that can go wrong will go wrong! Relive the glory days of burlesque cartoons!

programme.title: Maya the Bee - Season 2 - Little Treasure
programme.desc: Maya has custody of a sassy little bee: Pamela. Pamela is determined to participate in the treasure hunt organized by Flip… But Maya does not want that. It is too dangerous. Pamela will disobey… and get in trouble.

programme.title: Hana's Helpline
programme.desc: Animated fun as a duck agony aunt helps other animals with emotional support. Hana helps Patsy learns that it's fun to have someone to look after and many more adventures.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: A shadowy government agency wants a copy of Gnasher's teeth to make the ultimate weapon!

programme.title: Discover Real Lives
programme.desc: Groundbreaking medical science and a homeless man finding refuge in a squat are just two of the stories in this collection of short documentaries.

programme.title: Funny Families
programme.desc: Family comes first as a boy meets his girlfriend's family and a young boy learns an important life lesson in this collection of animated short films.

programme.title: Kids Breakfast Box
programme.desc: Harvesting the moon's milk is just one of the adventures in this collection of animated short films.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and the gang go on a school trip and Walter fattens up Gnasher to sabotage a football match.

programme.title: LOL Family Comedy
programme.desc: Phil struggles with the new era of Hollywood and break ups abound in this collection of family comedy short films.

programme.title: Pick n' Mix
programme.desc: A time machine in an antique shop and what's hiding under the bed? Plus much more in this bumper collection of short films.

programme.title: Celebrity Mix
programme.desc: Joel Murray stars in The Listing Agent and Kate Dickie stars in The Operator, just two of the famous faces starring in this collection of short films.

programme.title: Modern Persuasion
programme.desc: A sexy, modern telling of Jane Austen's "Persuasion." Wren (Alicia Witt: Orange is the New Black) is a happy, single and self-confessed workaholic who, after rising to the top of the corporate ladder, finds herself coming home to her cat every night.

programme.title: Love Wedding Marriage
programme.desc: A happy newlywed marriage counselor's views on wedded bliss get thrown for a loop when she finds out her parents are getting divorced. Starring: Mandy Moore, Kellan Lutz, James Brolin

programme.title: Committed
programme.desc: A road trip movie set in Cyprus about a chance meeting between a man being pressured to propose to his girlfriend and a runaway bride.

programme.title: Jennys Wedding
programme.desc: Katherine Heigl and Alexis Bledel shine in this touching tale of overcoming obstacles in the face of true love! When Jenny decides to marry the love of her life, the safe world her family has always inhabited changes completely.

programme.title: All Roads Lead To Rome
programme.desc: A timeless and moving romantic comedy. Uptight mother Maggie and her former Italian lover, Luca, go on a road trip across scenic Italy pursuing Maggie's rebellious teenage daughter who tries desperately to return to New York.

programme.title: Time After Time
programme.desc: About Time meets The Time Traveller’s Wife in this coming-of-age sci-fi romance. When physics genius Stillman is dumped by his girlfriend Debbie, he creates a time machine and with his wing-man Evan sets off to right every wrong.

programme.title: Editor's Pick - Surprise! The best Shorts from all Genres.
programme.desc: A selection of films drawing from our extensive list of genres to entertain, intrigue and surprise our viewers.

programme.title: Hit Pix - Award Winning Short Films
programme.desc: Films that have come out on top at the Festivals. Often Star Studded. Always brilliant.

programme.desc: They say you can't choose your family. A collection of short movies that focus on family relationships.

programme.title: Documentaries - to surprise, educate and entertain you.
programme.desc: A variety of short documentaries to surprise, educate and entertain you.

programme.title: Editor's Pick - Surprise! The best Shorts from all Genres.
programme.desc: A selection of films drawing from our extensive list of genres to entertain, intrigue and surprise our viewers.

programme.title: Family Ties - They say you can't choose your family.
programme.desc: They say you can't choose your family. A collection of short movies that focus on family relationships.

programme.title: Animation - Artistic Animated movies in a range of forms.
programme.desc: Creative and artistic stories brought to life with pens, paints, plasticine and all other art forms.

programme.title: Eternal Love
programme.desc: A young couple's relationship develops quickly when one of them is diagnosed with a life-changing illness.

programme.title: The Man Without a Face
programme.desc: Mel Gibson plays the disfigured teacher McLeod, who befriends a young and lonely boy and secretly provides him with tuition so that he can pass the entry exams of the military academy once attended by the boy's late father. Together they begin to help each other deal with a world that has shunned them both.

programme.title: All of Me
programme.desc: A dying millionaire has her soul transferred into a younger, willing woman. However, something goes wrong, and she finds herself in her lawyer's body - together with the lawyer.

programme.title: Her Boyfriends's Secret
programme.desc: Believing she has found the guy of her dreams, home renovator Melissa Davis soon learns that her dream man has a dark secret.

programme.title: Mozart and the Whale
programme.desc: A love story between two savants with Asperger's syndrome, a kind of autism, whose conditions sabotage their budding relationship.

programme.title: October
programme.desc: In documentary style, events in Petrograd are re-enacted from the end of the monarchy in February of 1917 to the end of the provisional government and the decrees of peace and of land in November of that year. Lenin returns in April. In July, counter-revolutionaries put down a spontaneous revolt, and Lenin's arrest is ordered. By late October, the Bolsheviks are ready to strike: ten days will shake the world. While the Mensheviks vacillate, an advance guard infiltrates the palace. Anatov-Oveyenko leads the attack and signs the proclamation dissolving the provisional government.

programme.title: The Red House
programme.desc: An old man and his sister are concealing a terrible secret from their adopted teen daughter, concerning a hidden abandoned farmhouse, located deep in the woods.

programme.title: Toll Bar
programme.desc: Rauan works at a parking lot in a prestigious residential area. Aidar passes him daily in his luxurious car. The auto belongs to his father, who works in the oil business. Rauan and Aidar are both determined to build their own lives themselves. They live in the same city, their paths cross in the same yard, but there is an abyss between them. They are separated by a toll-bar between wealth and poverty. One day Aidar and Rauan will clash and their worlds will clash. What will the results be..?

programme.title: And Then There Were None
programme.desc: Seven guests, a newly hired personal secretary and two staff are gathered for a weekend on an isolated island by the hosts the Owens who are delayed. At dinner a record is played and the host's message alleges that all the people present are guilty of murder and suddenly the first of them is dead, then the next - It seems that one of them is the murderer but the leading person is always the person who is murdered next and at last only two people are left.

programme.title: Under Capricorn
programme.desc: In 1831, Irishman Charles Adare travels to Australia to start a new life with the help of his cousin who has just been appointed governor. When he arrives he meets powerful landowner and ex-convict Sam Flusky, who wants to do a business deal with him. Whilst attending a dinner party at Flusky's house, Charles meets Flusky's wife Henrietta who he had known as a child back in Ireland. Henrietta is an alcoholic and seems to be on the verge of madness.

programme.title: The Romantics
programme.desc: Oscar winner Anna Paquin and Katie Holmes prove nothing complicates love like friendship in this zeitgeist love story.

programme.title: Elvis the Early Years: Part 1
programme.desc: The KING OF ROCK N’ ROLL, from his working class life in Memphis, Tennessee to worldwide super-stardom. Sit at the edge of your seat when Elvis struggles to make his great come-back and enjoy all the unforgettable hits.

programme.title: Elvis the Early Years: Part 2
programme.desc: The KING OF ROCK N’ ROLL, from his working class life in Memphis, Tennessee to worldwide super-stardom. Sit at the edge of your seat when Elvis struggles to make his great come-back and enjoy all the unforgettable hits.

programme.title: All Roads Lead To Rome
programme.desc: A timeless and moving romantic comedy. Uptight mother Maggie and her former Italian lover, Luca, go on a road trip across scenic Italy pursuing Maggie's rebellious teenage daughter who tries desperately to return to New York.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: A raven-haired enchantress, Cassie Nightingale, mysteriously moves into the local haunted mansion, 'Grey House', and seems to change her neighbors lives using a hint of magic causing many to think she’s a witch.

programme.title: Whats Eating Gilbert Grape
programme.desc: Gilbert feels trapped - with no father present and an eccentric family to care for, he is struggling to cope. Despite the hardships Gilbert perseveres, but will he be able to live his own life?

programme.title: A Boy and His Dog
programme.desc: In the post-apocalyptic world of 2024, rover Vic (Don Johnson) hears a voice from his dog and communicates with him telepathically. The dog is called Blood (voiced by Tim McIntire). Vic is an 18-year-old boy who was born in and scavenging throughout the wasteland of the former southwestern United States.

programme.title: The Z Effect
programme.desc: The Zombie Apocalypse is upon us. Through six parts we follow main characters Scott and Mike surviving the beginning of a zombie apocalypse.

programme.title: Abandoned
programme.desc: In 1989 the trimaran Rose Noelle set sail from Picton, New Zealand, bound for Tonga with four crew. After a freak wave capsized the yacht, they drifted for 119 days before landing on Great Barrier Island.

programme.title: CARRUSEL
programme.desc: Santiago Rubio, Mayor of a Latin American City wants to be the nation President. To achieve his goal, he decides to build the biggest and most important airport in South America. For that purpose, he hires Hoyos Constructing Group, a very corrupt company that instead of building the airport, they spend all nation’s money in their own benefit. Maria Cristina, Mayor´s wife and Gabriel Hoyos lover, is the key piece for the Hoyos to win the contract.

programme.title: Marilyn Monroe Part II
programme.desc: There is no actress as iconic as Marilyn Monroe. Let’s hear about her life.

programme.title: Another World
programme.desc: In a post-apocalyptic future, a biological warfare program gone wrong leaves only four survivors defending themselves from "the infected" - mindless killers. As they struggle to survive and make sense of what is happening, they find another survivor, intent on revealing the truth.

programme.title: Barabbas
programme.desc: Billy Zane stars as Barabbas--the man whose life was spared because of the crucifixion of Jesus Christ. Based on the Nobel Prize in Literature winning novel by Par Lagerkvist, Barabbas is a story rooted in the Bible which will come to life on REELZ as a four-hour miniseries and tells the ultimate story of redemption. Barabbas was shot on location in Tunisia and is directed by Emmy Award winner Roger Young.

programme.title: His Secret Past
programme.desc: Popular crime novelist, Jennifer Becker lives a lavish life in a small coastal town in California with her daughter, Lily. One day, while out for a run, Lily is attacked--but then rescued by a mysterious stranger named Mick.

programme.title: Aberrant
programme.desc: Cole (Jack Quaid) stirs everyone up during his best friend's wedding as something seems off between him and the bride.

programme.title: An Hour Behind
programme.desc: The time change and a case of mistaken identity result in a wonderful blind date for Trish and Parker, but is it enough to keep them together?

programme.title: All of My Heart 2
programme.desc: Brian and Jenny are preparing for the big opening of their bed and breakfast, Emily's Country Inn, when a huge storm hits Bucks County. Brian agrees to return to Wall Street to boost their funds, while Jenny scrambles to keep the opening on time.

programme.title: Forever Love
programme.desc: A couple's lost love goes full circle between the 50's and the present.

programme.title: Discreet
programme.desc: Monique, a high-class escort, has always given her clients what they wanted, while clean-cut Thomas, has always been what everyone has expected.

programme.title: Spinning Plates
programme.desc: Spinning Plates is a documentary about three extraordinary restaurants and the incredible people who make them what they are. A cutting-edge restaurant named the seventh-best in the world whose chef must battle a life-threatening obstacle to pursue his passion. A 150-year-old family restaurant still standing only because of the unbreakable bond with its community. A fledgling Mexican restaurant whose owners are risking everything just to survive and provide for their young daughter. Their unforgettable stories of family, legacy, passion and survival come together to reveal how meaningful food can be, and the power it has to connect us to one another.

programme.title: Hail Mary!
programme.desc: What do you do when your pro football franchise have lost thirty two games in a row? Buy up a school of Japanese Sumo Wrestlers, with all of its gargantuan 600 plus pound Sumos and make them into linemen protecting your precious star quarterback, O'Rourke.

programme.title: Adios Amigo
programme.desc: A conman's crimes are blamed on a good-natured fast-drawing cowboy he meets and decides to use as decoy.

programme.title: Bride to Be
programme.desc: What if pain was merely a set up for the ultimate surprise party? Genie Burns, owner of Surprise Enterprise, masterminds off the wall surprise parties in nobody would-suspect-it locations. Here she takes crazy risks but in her love life, she plays it safe. Her partner Steven, who hilariously calls her out on every issue she owns, is gay which makes him safe. Danny, her friend from college would be perfect for her but she keeps him in the friend zone. Along comes Jeff, everything she avoids, but his charm and depth draw her in. Is he the right one because he challenges her fears, or the wrong one because he implodes them? And why, she asks, are cereal boxes summoning her in the night! Meanwhile, Surprise Enterprise is hired by an anonymous Hollywood producer to throw a surprise wedding for his intended bride. Genie must get the bride down the aisle without knowing she's the bride. Her plan is to have him pretend he's filming a movie with a wedding at the end, giving his girlfriend a role. But as Genie plans the wedding, everything seems to go wrong, and her own life begins to take turns. In the end, what's real in life screams.... Surprise!

programme.title: Death Watch
programme.desc: A terrorist plants several bombs throughout the city of Colombo, Sri Lanka and threatens to detonate them unless prisoners are released.

programme.title: A Stranger in the Kingdom
programme.desc: Murder wasnt the only crime this town would never forget.

programme.title: Ricochet
programme.desc: A detective is caught up in the lives of a judge and his wife who are linked to a man with criminal leanings.

programme.title: Stranger in the Family
programme.desc: A young man, in the aftermath of a terrible car accident, can't remember anything about his life or his family

programme.title: A Stranger in the Kingdom
programme.desc: Murder wasnt the only crime this town would never forget.

programme.title: Hostile Advances: The Kerry Ellison Story
programme.desc: Kerry Ellison is sexually harassed at work. Her only option left is court. Will she win?

programme.title: Someone I Used to Know
programme.desc: An overweight man meets a former classmate on their high school track. As the two grow close and inspire each other, their pasts creep back into their lives and begin to threaten all that they have developed.

programme.title: Sand Angels
programme.desc: Will Esperanza be able to show Tom the truth about his past, present and future? Will she be able to save all the young people in the world who suffer from depression near Christmas Time? Can Tom be convinced to make the most of his life whilst he has time?

programme.title: The Hardest Thing
programme.desc: FSKNR

programme.title: Beauty in the Broken
programme.desc: FSK6

programme.title: Comfort
programme.desc: FSKNR

programme.title: American Sophmore
programme.desc: FSKNR

programme.title: Red Dog: The Early Years
programme.desc: RED DOG: THE EARLY YEARS is a glorious tale of youthful adventure set in the Australian outback as a young boy and an Australian Kelpie sheep dog become the best of friends. Set in the late 1980s, 11-year-old Mick is sent to live with his stern farmer grandfather on a vast cattle station. There, he forms an unbreakable bond with a cute puppy he finds covered in blue mud after a storm. Together the pair embark on a series of great adventures amidst the stunning Aussie landscape.

programme.title: Captain Abu Raed
programme.desc: When an old airport janitor finds a captain's hat in the trash, he gets pulled into the lives of children in his poor neighborhood. He weaves imaginary stories of his world adventures to offer hope in the face of their harsh reality.

programme.title: Miss Virginia
programme.desc: An incredibly inspiring, heart-warming and extremely relevant true story about a heroic young mother who's grit and determination has gone on to save the future of thousands of children. Starring Uzo Aduba ('Orange is the New Black') in the titular role, Niles Fitch (This is Us) as her son James, as well as Matthew Modine ('Full Metal Jacket') and Vanessa Williams ('Shaft'). Virginia Walden an impoverished single mother who is losing her fifteen-year-old son to the rough streets of Washington D.C. Unwilling to see him drop out and deal drugs, she places him in a private school.

programme.title: The Body
programme.desc: A crucified body dated back to the first century A.D is uncovered at an ancient cave in Jerusalem. Trouble ensues as word spreads.

programme.title: Arctic
programme.desc: Full of shock turns, moments of horrific injury, polar bear action and tense emotional scenes, Arctic will keep your hands clenched to your chair until its brilliant, breathless conclusion. Mads Mikkelsen gives a tour de force performance as a pilot whose plane has crashed in a remote corner of the Arctic. Stranded in the wilderness he uses his ingenuity to survive. When about to receive his long-awaited rescue, an explosive accident means his opportunity is lost and the dire situation further complicated. The tragic turn of events, involving another crash survivor forces the pilot to make a perilous choice between the relative safety of his camp and a deadly trek into the unknown.

programme.title: Salt and fire
programme.desc: A scientist blames the head of a large company for an ecological disaster in South America. But when a volcano begins to show signs of erupting, they must unite to avoid a disaster.

programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: A thriller centered on a young man who sets out to uncover the truth about his life after finding his baby photo on a missing persons website.

programme.title: Encounter
programme.desc: A group of friends make a remarkable discovery in a rural field - a crashed spacecraft - And there's a survivor. But when they bring the otherworldly being home, they soon discover that it holds even greater secrets than they could imagine. But with the government on their tail, time is running out to ascertain the alien's true intentions.

programme.title: Saints and Soldiers - Battle of the Tanks
programme.desc: Germany, May 1945, deep in the Harz Mountains a U.S. tank crew discovers a platoon of Germans preparing to ambush U.S. supply trucks. A deadly game of cat and mouse quickly unfolds as the Americans find themselves out-gunned and out-manned by three German tanks.Tension and fear begin to grow as the crew reluctantly decide they must stop the enemy from executing their deadly plan. Knowing that hundreds of lives are at stake they must put aside their differences and work together to fight a desperate battle against the greatest odds they have ever faced.

programme.title: The Missing Sister
programme.desc: When Sharon finally tracks down her missing sister Raven, she’s elated to be back together – until she begins to suspect that Raven isn’t her sister at all, but rather an opportunistic imposter.

programme.title: The Pirate
programme.desc: The Pirate is the epic true story of Ioannis Varvakis, a humble Greek pirate who, with the help of Catherine The Great, went on to become an international caviar millionaire but ended his days as an inmate on a remote prison island. This epic tale moves from the Greek islands, to the court of the Russian Queen, and then back to a country torn apart by revolution and civil war. This is a story of one man s journey from pirate to nobleman amid war and a fight for independence.
